metadata.name: Set up AV for a Meeting

description: An event manager needs to ensure the audio-visual equipment is set up and working for a corporate meeting.

nodes.task_description: Review the Banquet Event Order (BEO) to see the specific AV requirements (e.g., projector, screen, microphone).

expected_outcome.value: The manager confirms the required equipment from the BEO.

nodes.task_description: Assign an AV technician to set up the equipment in the correct meeting room.

expected_outcome.value: A technician is dispatched to perform the setup.

nodes.task_description: The technician tests all equipment to ensure it is functioning correctly before the event starts.

expected_outcome.value: All AV equipment is tested and confirmed to be working.
